added.name: PiercesDebuffImmunity
added.description: Return if an ability and its modifiers should pierce debuff immunity.

added.name: PiercesDebuffImmunity
added.description: Returns true or false on if the effects of this modifier should pierce debuff immunity. By default uses the setting from the ability.

added.name: GetAltCastState
added.description: Gets the current Alt Cast State.

added.name: SetAltCastState
added.description: Set Alt Cast State to a specific value (true for on, false for off).

added.name: ShouldAltCast
added.description: This is what the Alt Cast State of the ability was when it was initially cast. Updated during Execute Orders.

added.name: ToggleAltCast
added.description: Toggle the Alt Cast State of an Ability.

description.old: Runs when item's charge count changes.
description.new: Runs when item's charge count changes. bSpent is true when the charge count change is coming from SpendCharge.
